audit_items.proof_trace: The only dynamic resource in devlink_param.c is the `struct nfp_nsp *` handle returned by `nfp_nsp_open`. In all three functions that call it (nfp_devlink_param_u8_get, nfp_devlink_param_u8_set, nfp_devlink_supports_params), every success path (non-IS_ERR) is paired with `nfp_nsp_close(nsp)` via goto-label or straight-line fallthrough; IS_ERR early returns carry no allocated resource. No kmalloc/kzalloc/vmalloc calls exist anywhere in the file.
